about.label: About us
about.title: Welcome to Adriatic Padel Club
about.description1: Located in Plano near Trogir, Adriatic Padel Club is the premier destination for padel enthusiasts of all levels. Our club combines top-quality courts, professional coaches and a friendly atmosphere to provide you with an unforgettable padel experience.
about.description2: Whether you're a beginner looking to learn the basics or an experienced player seeking a challenge, our team is here to help you achieve your goals.
about.bestCourtsAdriatic: The best courts on the Adriatic

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Have questions? We have answers.
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about padel and our club. If you can't find the answer, feel free to contact us.

whatIsPadel.question: What is padel and how is it played?
whatIsPadel.answer: Padel is a fast-growing racket sport that combines elements of tennis and squash. It is played on an enclosed court with glass walls, in pairs (2 vs 2). The ball can bounce off the walls, making the game dynamic and fun for all skill levels.

needExperience.question: Do I need prior experience to play?
needExperience.answer: No! Padel is known as a sport that is easy to learn. Our coaches specialize in working with beginners and will help you master the basics in no time. We also offer free introductory sessions for new members.

howToBook.question: How can I book a court?
howToBook.answer: You can book courts through our online platform Playtomic, by phone, or in person at the club. Bookings are available up to 14 days in advance, and members have priority for the most popular time slots.

noEquipment.question: Can I come to play without equipment?
noEquipment.answer: Yes! You can borrow rackets and balls at the club. Basic racket rental is 3€ and premium is 5€. We recommend wearing sports shoes with a non-marking sole and comfortable sportswear. We also have changing rooms with showers.

amateurTournaments.question: Do you organize tournaments for amateurs?
amateurTournaments.answer: Absolutely! We regularly organize tournaments for all skill levels, from complete beginners to advanced players. Tournaments are a great opportunity to meet new players and improve your skills in a competitive environment.

newsletter.title: Subscribe to our newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: Be the first to know about news, tournaments and special offers.
